identity.analogy: The collaborative canvas where teams build digital products together
identity.oneLiner: A collaborative design platform that turns ideas into products

colors.principle: High-contrast monochrome with strategic black accent buttons for clear CTAs

rules: Headlines use tight tracking and bold weight for impact
Body text maintains comfortable 1.5 line height for readability

spacing.rhythm: Consistent 8-point baseline grid with generous vertical padding

layout.skeleton: Full-width hero section with floating card overlay, followed by centered text and logo grid

components.button: Black filled button with white text for primary actions, outlined button for secondary
components.card: White floating card with subtle shadow containing hero text input
components.input: Large text input field within a floating white card with placeholder text
components.hero: Animated carousel of gray rectangles behind a floating white card with text input

patterns: Carousel animation for hero section backgrounds
Typewriter effect for hero headline text

interaction.hover: Subtle background color change on buttons
interaction.keyboard: Standard tab navigation through interactive elements

voice.headlineStyle: Action-oriented, short phrases with incomplete text that gets completed dynamically
voice.ctaStyle: Direct and imperative ('Get started for free', 'Contact sales')
avoid: Avoid overly casual or slang language
Avoid technical jargon in marketing copy

donts: Don't use colorful gradients — screenshot shows clean black and white with neutral grays
Don't use rounded pill shapes for all elements — screenshot shows mix of sharp and rounded corners
Don't use low-contrast text — screenshot maintains strong black on white contrast
Don't clutter the hero section — screenshot shows focused single CTA with minimal text
Don't use serif fonts — screenshot exclusively uses geometric sans-serif typography
Don't add unnecessary decorative elements — screenshot maintains clean, functional aesthetic
en.systemPrompt: Figma is a collaborative web-based design tool positioning itself as the platform where teams brainstorm, design, and build products together. Key visual characteristics include a predominantly black and white color scheme (#000000 ink on #FFFFFF background) with strategic use of gray for backgrounds and muted elements. Typography uses geometric sans-serif fonts with tight tracking for headlines and comfortable line heights for body text. The hero section features animated gray rectangles behind a floating white card with interactive text input. Critical design principles: maintain high contrast for readability, use generous whitespace, keep CTAs visually prominent with black filled buttons. Avoid colorful gradients, overly decorative elements, or low-contrast text. The interface emphasizes clarity and functionality over decoration, with a premium feel achieved through restraint and precision.

en.palette: Clean monochrome palette with black (#000000) as primary accent on white (#FFFFFF) background, using neutral grays for secondary elements.
en.layout: Full-width sections with generous spacing, centered content containers, and a prominent hero area with floating interactive card overlay.
en.interaction: Direct and immediate button responses with smooth carousel transitions and typewriter text animations in the hero section.
en.motion: Subtle carousel animations and typewriter effects that enhance the collaborative, dynamic nature of the platform without being distracting.
en.notes: This site exemplifies premium SaaS design with its clean, confident aesthetic that communicates professionalism while remaining approachable and functional.
